targets.rawSQL:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT processInstanceKey) AS completed_process_count
FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-flownode-instance-8.3.1_alias"
WHERE processInstanceKey NOT IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT processInstanceKey
  FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-flownode-instance-8.3.1_alias"
  WHERE state = 'ACTIVE'
)
AND startDate BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

panels.description: Bezogen auf die Vorgänge, die erfolgreich abgeschlossen wurden

targets.rawSQL:
WITH completed_cases AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM CAST(variable.orderNumber AS VARCHAR)) AS case_id
  FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-flownode-instance-8.3.1_alias" AS flownode
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT processInstanceKey, CAST(value AS VARCHAR) AS orderNumber
    FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-variable-8.3.0_alias" AS v
    WHERE v."name" = 'orderNumber'
  ) AS variable
    ON flownode.processInstanceKey = variable.processInstanceKey
  WHERE flownode.type NOT IN ('EXCLUSIVE_GATEWAY', 'RECEIVE_TASK')
    AND variable.orderNumber IS NOT NULL
    AND flownode.startDate BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM CAST(variable.orderNumber AS VARCHAR))
  HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN flownode.state = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
     AND SUM(CASE WHEN flownode.state = 'TERMINATED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
     AND SUM(CASE WHEN flownode.state = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
)
SELECT SUM(coi.quantity) AS total_sold_products
FROM mysql.bpa_lab_demonstration_factory.customer_order_item AS coi
JOIN mysql.bpa_lab_demonstration_factory.customer_order AS co
  ON coi.order_id = co.customer_order_number
WHERE CAST(co.customer_order_number AS VARCHAR) IN (SELECT case_id FROM completed_cases)

panels.title: Anzahl der verkauften Fahrräder

targets.rawSQL:
WITH activity_durations AS (
  SELECT
    flownode.flowNodeId AS activity,
    AVG(DATE_DIFF('second', flownode.startDate, flownode.endDate)) AS avg_duration_seconds
  FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-flownode-instance-8.3.1_alias" AS flownode
  WHERE flownode.processInstanceKey NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT processInstanceKey
    FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-flownode-instance-8.3.1_alias"
    WHERE state = 'ACTIVE'
  )
    AND flownode.type NOT IN ('EXCLUSIVE_GATEWAY', 'RECEIVE_TASK')
    AND flownode.startDate IS NOT NULL
    AND flownode.endDate IS NOT NULL
    AND flownode.startDate BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY flownode.flowNodeId
)
SELECT activity, avg_duration_seconds
FROM activity_durations
ORDER BY avg_duration_seconds DESC
LIMIT 3

WITH completed_cases AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM CAST(variable.orderNumber AS VARCHAR)) AS case_id
  FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-flownode-instance-8.3.1_alias" AS flownode
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT processInstanceKey, CAST(value AS VARCHAR) AS orderNumber
    FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-variable-8.3.0_alias" AS v
    WHERE v."name" = 'orderNumber'
  ) AS variable
    ON flownode.processInstanceKey = variable.processInstanceKey
  WHERE variable.orderNumber IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM CAST(variable.orderNumber AS VARCHAR))
  HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN flownode.state = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
),
case_durations AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM CAST(variable.orderNumber AS VARCHAR)) AS case_id,
    DATE_DIFF('second', MIN(flownode.startDate), MAX(flownode.endDate)) AS lead_time_seconds
  FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-flownode-instance-8.3.1_alias" AS flownode
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT processInstanceKey, CAST(value AS VARCHAR) AS orderNumber
    FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-variable-8.3.0_alias" AS v
    WHERE v."name" = 'orderNumber'
  ) AS variable
    ON flownode.processInstanceKey = variable.processInstanceKey
  WHERE TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM CAST(variable.orderNumber AS VARCHAR)) IN (SELECT case_id FROM completed_cases)
    AND flownode.startDate IS NOT NULL
    AND flownode.endDate IS NOT NULL
    AND flownode.startDate BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM CAST(variable.orderNumber AS VARCHAR))
)
SELECT AVG(lead_time_seconds) AS avg_end_to_end_duration_seconds
FROM case_durations

panels.description: Anteil der abgeschlossenen Vorgänge, die manuell abgebrochen werden mussten z. B. aufgrund von Fehlern

targets.rawSQL:
WITH cases_counts AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN flownode.state = 'COMPLETED' THEN TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM CAST(variable.orderNumber AS VARCHAR)) END) AS completed_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN flownode.state = 'TERMINATED' THEN TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM CAST(variable.orderNumber AS VARCHAR)) END) AS terminated_count
  FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-flownode-instance-8.3.1_alias" AS flownode
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT processInstanceKey, CAST(value AS VARCHAR) AS orderNumber
    FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-variable-8.3.0_alias" AS v
    WHERE v."name" = 'orderNumber'
  ) AS variable
    ON flownode.processInstanceKey = variable.processInstanceKey
  WHERE flownode.startDate BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
)
SELECT CASE
  WHEN cases_counts.completed_count > 0 THEN ROUND((cases_counts.terminated_count * 100.0 / cases_counts.completed_count), 2)
  ELSE NULL
END AS error_rate_percentage
FROM cases_counts

panels.title: Abbruch-/Fehlerquote

panels.description: Bezogen auf die Vorgänge, die erfolgreich abgeschlossen wurden

targets.rawSQL:
WITH completed_cases AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM CAST(variable.orderNumber AS VARCHAR)) AS case_id
  FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-flownode-instance-8.3.1_alias" AS flownode
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT processInstanceKey, CAST(value AS VARCHAR) AS orderNumber
    FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-variable-8.3.0_alias" AS v
    WHERE v."name" = 'orderNumber'
  ) AS variable
    ON flownode.processInstanceKey = variable.processInstanceKey
  WHERE flownode.type NOT IN ('EXCLUSIVE_GATEWAY', 'RECEIVE_TASK')
    AND variable.orderNumber IS NOT NULL
    AND flownode.startDate BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM CAST(variable.orderNumber AS VARCHAR))
  HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN flownode.state = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
     AND SUM(CASE WHEN flownode.state = 'TERMINATED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
     AND SUM(CASE WHEN flownode.state = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
)
SELECT
  CAST(coi.bike_model_id AS VARCHAR) AS product,
  SUM(coi.quantity) AS sold_count
FROM mysql.bpa_lab_demonstration_factory.customer_order_item AS coi
JOIN mysql.bpa_lab_demonstration_factory.customer_order AS co
  ON coi.order_id = co.customer_order_number
WHERE CAST(co.customer_order_number AS VARCHAR) IN (SELECT case_id FROM completed_cases)
GROUP BY CAST(coi.bike_model_id AS VARCHAR)
ORDER BY sold_count DESC

panels.title: Anteil pro Fahrradmodell

panels.description: Anteil der abgeschlossenen Vorgänge, in denen der Produktionsprozess gestartet wurde

targets.rawSQL:
WITH case_counts AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM CAST(variable.orderNumber AS VARCHAR)) AS case_id,
    flownode.bpmnProcessId
  FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-flownode-instance-8.3.1_alias" AS flownode
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT processInstanceKey, CAST(value AS VARCHAR) AS orderNumber
    FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-variable-8.3.0_alias" AS v
    WHERE v."name" = 'orderNumber'
  ) AS variable
    ON flownode.processInstanceKey = variable.processInstanceKey
  WHERE flownode.processInstanceKey NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT processInstanceKey
    FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-flownode-instance-8.3.1_alias"
    WHERE state = 'ACTIVE'
  )
    AND variable.orderNumber IS NOT NULL
    AND flownode.startDate BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
)
SELECT CASE
  WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0 THEN ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bpmnProcessId = 'BPALabBikeFactoryProductionControl' THEN case_id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)), 2)
  ELSE NULL
END AS production_control_percentage
FROM case_counts

panels.title: Produktionsanteil

panels.description: Anteil der abgeschlossenen Vorgänge, in denen der Einkaufsprozess gestartet wurde

targets.rawSQL:
WITH case_counts AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM CAST(variable.orderNumber AS VARCHAR)) AS case_id,
    flownode.bpmnProcessId
  FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-flownode-instance-8.3.1_alias" AS flownode
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT processInstanceKey, CAST(value AS VARCHAR) AS orderNumber
    FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-variable-8.3.0_alias" AS v
    WHERE v."name" = 'orderNumber'
  ) AS variable
    ON flownode.processInstanceKey = variable.processInstanceKey
  WHERE flownode.processInstanceKey NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT processInstanceKey
    FROM elasticsearch.default."operate-flownode-instance-8.3.1_alias"
    WHERE state = 'ACTIVE'
  )
    AND variable.orderNumber IS NOT NULL
    AND flownode.startDate BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
)
SELECT CASE
  WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0 THEN ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bpmnProcessId = 'BPALabBikeFactoryPurchasing' THEN case_id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)), 2)
  ELSE NULL
END AS purchasing_process_percentage
FROM case_counts
